steps.title: Identify the causation pattern
steps.content: Science fiction “inspired,” “sparked,” and “spurred” technological advancements. These words show that science fiction acts as an active force generating innovations.

steps.title: Match the target meaning
steps.content: The blank needs a word meaning “something that causes or drives innovation.” Catalyst means exactly that — it's something that causes or accelerates a process. The other three either contradict this active role (diversion and constraint) or suggest passive backing rather than direct causation (sponsor). That matches choice B — B is correct.
